basic_details.job_title: Panjab University Digital Media Designer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Panjab University Digital Media Designer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website puchd.ac.in. A total of 2 Digital Media Designer vacancies have been announced through the Panjab University Digital Media Designer Recruitment 2026.

rows.panjab_university: Diploma or Degree in Graphic Designing / Animation / Mass Communication / Allied discipline

content_sections.heading: Panjab University Digital Media Designer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Panjab University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Panjab University Digital Media Designer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Panjab University Digital Media Designer Vacancy Details 2026
Panjab University Digital Media Designer Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Diploma or Degree in Graphic Designing / Animation / Mass Communication / Allied discipline

content_sections.heading: Panjab University Digital Media Designer Salary 2026
Panjab University Digital Media Designer Important Dates 2026
Panjab University Digital Media Designer Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Panjab University Digital Media Designer Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Panjab University Digital Media Designer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Panjab University Digital Media Designer recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Digital Media Designer position at Panjab University is scheduled for 23 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Digital Media Designer post?
faq.answer: Panjab University is recruiting for a total of 2 vacancies for the Digital Media Designer post. This includes roles such as Graphic Designer, Video Editor, and Animator.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Digital Media Designer role?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Digital Media Designer position, candidates must possess a Diploma or Degree in Graphic Designing, Animation, Mass Communication, or an allied discipline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Digital Media Designer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Digital Media Designer post will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 31,000 per month. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for this recruitment. Both General/OBC and SC/ST category candidates are not required to pay any fee to apply.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Digital Media Designer role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Digital Media Designer position at Panjab University will involve a Skill Test followed by an Interview. Candidates must perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates do not need to apply online; they must attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF contains the specific venue details for the walk-in interview. Candidates are advised to refer to the PDF for the exact location and reporting time.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The Digital Media Designer position at Panjab University is a contract-based job. The selected candidates will be appointed on a contract basis.
